questions.text: Have all relevant risks associated with the production environment and the use of the system been identified and thoroughly documented?
questions.category: MG01 - Design the post-market surveillance system considering all the highlighted risks

questions.text: Does the design of the surveillance system integrate specific measures that address each of the identified risks?
questions.category: MG01 - Design the post-market surveillance system considering all the highlighted risks

questions.text: Have key indicators been defined that comprehensively cover the critical aspects of the operational environment (intelligent system, infrastructure, cybersecurity, users)?
questions.category: MG02 - Create indicators on all aspects of the environment

questions.text: Is the selection of indicators based on criteria of relevance and the criticality of the environment, with due documented justification?
questions.category: MG02 - Create indicators on all aspects of the environment

questions.text: Have the effectiveness and relevance of these indicators been validated in tests in real or simulated scenarios?
questions.category: MG02 - Create indicators on all aspects of the environment

questions.text: Have normal scales or ranges of acceptable values been set for each indicator, based on historical analysis and expected scenarios?
questions.category: MG03 - Establish the normality scales for each indicator

questions.text: Is the determination of these scales adequately justified and aligned with the real operating conditions of the environment?
questions.category: MG03 - Establish the normality scales for each indicator

questions.text: Is there a mechanism in place to regularly update the scales based on the evolution of the environment or new data collected?
questions.category: MG03 - Establish the normality scales for each indicator

questions.text: Does the system incorporate a real-time alerting mechanism that continuously monitors key indicators?
questions.category: MG04 - Integrate a real-time alert system

questions.text: Have critical thresholds been set up that, when exceeded by default or excess, trigger immediate alerts to those responsible?
questions.category: MG04 - Integrate a real-time alert system

questions.text: Have tests been carried out in both simulated and real environments to ensure reliability and speed in activating alerts?
questions.category: MG04 - Integrate a real-time alert system

questions.text: Has a controlled process for implementing the surveillance system in the production environment been planned and documented?
questions.category: MG05 - Implement the post-marketing surveillance system in production

questions.text: Has the surveillance system been implemented in production?
questions.category: MG05 - Implement the post-marketing surveillance system in production

questions.text: Have tests been carried out in the production environment to validate the operability and robustness of the surveillance system?
questions.category: MG06 - Conduct production testing of the post-market surveillance system

questions.text: Is there a formal policy that contemplates both continuous monitoring and periodic reviews of the surveillance system?
questions.category: MG07 - Establish the policy of continuous and periodic surveillance

questions.text: Are the roles and responsibilities related to oversight clearly defined and supported by management?
questions.category: MG07 - Establish the policy of continuous and periodic surveillance

questions.text: Is the policy reviewed and updated on a regular basis to adapt to changes in the environment or the emergence of new risks?
questions.category: MG07 - Establish the policy of continuous and periodic surveillance

questions.text: Have potential anomalous scenarios that may compromise the performance of the surveillance system been identified and documented?
questions.category: MG08 - Consider anomalous scenarios that may affect the performance of the surveillance system itself

questions.text: Are there contingency plans and specific measures to manage each of these scenarios?
questions.category: MG08 - Consider anomalous scenarios that may affect the performance of the surveillance system itself

questions.text: Has a leader or person responsible for the management of the post-market surveillance system been appointed, with the necessary authority?
questions.category: MG09 - Formalize leadership and commitment to the management of the surveillance system in the organization

questions.text: Is the commitment of senior management in the management of the system reflected in the allocation of resources and internal communication?
questions.category: MG09 - Formalize leadership and commitment to the management of the surveillance system in the organization

questions.text: Is there documentation of the monitoring plan that evidences the leadership and coordination of surveillance activities in the organization?
questions.category: MG09 - Formalize leadership and commitment to the management of the surveillance system in the organization

questions.text: Has a specific team, duly trained, been formed to respond to alerts and incidents detected by the surveillance system?
questions.category: MG10 - Assign a response team

questions.text: Are the roles and responsibilities of the response team clearly defined and communicated?
questions.category: MG10 - Assign a response team

questions.text: Is there a formal and documented response protocol that details the actions to be taken in the event of incident detection?
questions.category: MG11 - Define the response protocol

questions.text: Has the incident report template been generated?
questions.category: MG11 - Define the response protocol

questions.text: Have training needs been identified for all staff involved in post-market surveillance?
questions.category: MG12 - Carry out the necessary training tasks

questions.text: Are there training and response drills to evaluate the effectiveness and improve the coordination of the team?
questions.category: MG12 - Carry out the necessary training tasks

questions.text: Have regular periods been defined and documented for the review of the operation and effectiveness of the surveillance system?
questions.category: MG13 - Establish review and follow-up periods
